name: Faded Negative
exposure_compensation: +2/3 to +1 1/3 for the 1st exposure, 0 to +1/3 for the 2nd exposure (typically)

name: Ilford Pan F Plus 50
iso: Auto, up to ISO 6400 (for best results, try to limit the ISO to 1600 and lower when able)

name: Faded Color
white_balance: Auto (use a shift on the second exposure)
